block1.title: What is MarsAI?
block1.text: A festival of 1-minute short films created by AI Free talks and workshops AI experts sharing their insights with professionals and the general public A 2-day festival in Marseille at the heart of AI

block2.title: Purpose of the festival
block2.text: Putting people at the heart of AI-generated art Challenging participants’ creativity through a very short-form format Harnessing the power of AI around a theme: Imagine desirable futures

block3.title: Selection format
block3.text: 2-Month Call for Submissions 50 one-minute short films selected for the official competition Online distribution of the films (web and social media) Screening in theaters and at film festivals

block4.title: The venue
block4.subtitle: The platform
block4.text: 4,000 square meters of space in downtown Marseille to host the event

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions (FAQ) - MarsAI Festival
faq.disclaimer: You might find the answer to your question below!
faq.informations-content: Where and when is the MarsAI Festival taking place? The festival will run for two days, on Friday, June 5, and Sunday, June 7. The event will be held at the Dock des Suds (12 Rue Urbain V, 13002 Marseille). Doors open at 10:00 a.m. and close at 7:00 p.m.
faq.answer1-1: By public transportation: Metro Line 2 (Désirée Clary station) or Tram T2/T3 (Arenc Le Silo station).
faq.answer1-2: By car: Paid public parking lots (Indigo Quai d'Arenc, Espercieux) are located right nearby.
faq.answer1-3: For non-motorized transportation: A parking area for bicycles and scooters is available on the plaza.
faq.answer1-4: Is the site accessible to people with limited mobility? Yes, the Dock des Suds is a single-level facility and fully accessible. Accessible restrooms are available inside the building.
faq.question2: Should I buy or reserve a ticket?
faq.answer2: No, admission to the MarsAI festival is completely free and no ticket is required. You are welcome to come whenever you like.
faq.answer3: Admission is free, but subject to the capacity of the Dock des Suds. In the event of very high attendance, a line may be formed at the entrance for safety reasons.
faq.question4: Who is the MarsAI Festival for?
faq.answer4: The festival is designed for everyone! Whether you're a tech professional, a student, or simply curious about the latest advancements in artificial intelligence, you'll find talks and demonstrations tailored to your level.
faq.question5: Do I need to register in advance for the hands-on workshops?
faq.answer5: General admission is free, but registration is required for certain workshops; please sign up on-site at the festival reception desk on the day of the event. Spots are assigned on a first-come, first-served basis.

step1.title: Step 1: Movie Profile
step1.movieTitleFr: Film title translated into French (if possible)
step1.movieLanguage: Language of your film (if it contains dialogue or text)
step1.soundbankCheck: This video contains music and/or uses sound effects.
step1.soundbankLabel: Please list the sound banks or music used.

step2.title: Step 2: Declaration of AI Use
step2.chooseAIs: Select the AI models to use.
step2.promptsLabel: Prompts you used for AI generation:
step2.errorAtLeastOne: You must select at least one.

step3.title: Step 3: Multimedia and Accessibility
step3.thumbnail: The thumbnail for your film (an image that will be used to represent it):
step3.screenshots: Here are a few screenshots from your movie:
step3.errorAtLeastOneScreenshot: You must provide at least one screenshot.

step4.title: Step 4: Your Information
step4.marketingLabel: How did you hear about the MarsAI festival?
step4.marketingPoster: Through a sign or a flyer
step4.tosCheck: I agree to the terms of use.
step4.rulesCheck: I agree to the MarsAI Festival's video submission guidelines.
step4.errorTos: You must agree to the terms of use.
step4.errorRules: You must agree to the festival rules.
step4.errorAge: You must be at least 18 years old to participate.
step4.school: The school you currently attend (or attended in the past)
step4.job: Your current job (If you are a student, please indicate "student")

validation.invalidFormat: The format of this field is invalid.
validation.textTooLong: Text is too long; it must be less than {{max}} characters.
validation.textTooShort: Text is too short; it must be at least {{min}} characters long.
validation.notANumber: Error: This is not a number.
validation.numberTooSmall: The number must be greater than: {{min}}.
validation.numberTooLarge: The number must be less than: {{max}}.
validation.invalidDate: Invalid format; must be a date (year-month-day)
validation.dateTooLate: The date must not be later than {{max}}.
validation.dateTooEarly: The date must be later than {{min}}.
validation.videoRequired: You must upload a video file.
validation.notVideo: The file must be in video format (.mp4 or .mov).
validation.fileTooLarge: The file is too large; it must be less than {{max}} MB.
validation.fileTooSmall: The file is too small; it must be at least {{min}} MB.
validation.notImage: The file must be in image format (.png / .jpeg / .jpg).
